description: Test #>> operator for deep path extraction from JSONB, returning text that may be null if path does not exist

columns.name: deep_val
columns.note: Key path may not exist in the JSONB data, so result can be NULL

name: jsonb_deep_path_extraction
query_sql:
-- @name GetDeepValue
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, data #>> '{nested,deep,key}' AS deep_val FROM documents
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE documents (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, data JSONB NOT NULL, metadata JSONB);
